description: One-shot activation state for the Celo CGT v2 L2 predeploys: a single self-contained bundle (code + storage + balances). For each predeploys[] entry: (1) plant impl.bytecode at impl.address; (2) ensure the proxy account at address holds proxyShell.bytecode (identical for all predeploys; already on-chain for kind=upgrade); (3) apply storage (and balance) to the proxy account. A value of param:X is network-specific -- substitute params.X[network]; every other value is literal and identical on all networks. eip1967Slots decodes the two structural slots. Verify planted code with codeHash. Regenerate with generate.sh.

build.settings: optimizer=true, runs=999999, bytecode_hash=none; solc + evm_version are per-contract (0.8.15 -> london, 0.8.25 -> cancun)
build.derivation: storage/balances captured by simulating the real init calls and recording the diff, cross-checked with the compiler storage layout, cast index, and live Celo mainnet/sepolia/chaos

params.nativeAssetLiquidityAmount: <migration-time: L2 native balance backing bridged CELO, per network>
